title: Fantômas
writer: Pierre Souvestre, Marcel Allain, Pál Fejös
actors: Jean Galland, Tania Fédor, Thomy Bourdelle
plot: The Marquise de Langrune invites her friends at her castle in Beaulieu. Among them is Lord Beltham who also came to bring her a significant sum of money. Master criminal Fantômas kills the Marquise and Inspector Juve is sent on hi...
